Class TablesController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.TablesController
public class TablesController extends Object
Controller for managing restaurant tables. Handles displaying tables in a TableView, inserting, updating, deleting tables, and navigation to the previous page. Interacts with ClientHandler to perform server-side operations.

  • Constructor Details

    • TablesController

      public TablesController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Sets up TableView columns, registers this controller in ClientHandler, and loads the current list of tables from the server.

    • onInsert

      private void onInsert()
      Handles inserting a new table. Validates input fields, checks for duplicate table IDs, and calls ClientHandler to insert the table.

    • onUpdate

      private void onUpdate()
      Handles updating an existing table. Validates input fields, checks if the table exists, and calls ClientHandler to update the table.

    • onDelete

      private void onDelete()
      Handles deleting a table. Validates the table ID field, checks if the table exists, and calls ClientHandler to delete the table.

    • onPreviousPage

      private void onPreviousPage()
      Navigates back to the Supervisor UI.

    • updateTableList

      public void updateTableList(List<Table> tables)
      Updates the TableView with the provided list of tables. Called by ClientHandler after fetching tables from the server.
      Parameters:
      tables - the list of tables to display

    • reloadTables

      public void reloadTables()
      Reloads the list of tables from the server via ClientHandler.

    • parseIntegerField

      private Integer parseIntegerField(javafx.scene.control.TextField field, String fieldName)
      Parses an integer value from a TextField. Shows an error alert if the field is empty or not a valid number.
      Parameters:
      field - the TextField to parse
      fieldName - the name of the field for error messages
      Returns:
      the parsed integer, or null if invalid

    • showError

      public void showError(String msg)
      Displays an error alert with the provided message.
      Parameters:
      msg - the message to display

    • showInfo

      public void showInfo(String msg)
      Displays an information alert with the provided message.
      Parameters:
      msg - the message to display
